TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Maurice_Baker, title = Maurice_Baker, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maurice_Baker} }

S.FORM: Maurice Baker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1979, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 7, Maurice Baker, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Maurice Baker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1979, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 7, Maurice Baker, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mauriʦ~ʨe βaker s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, mauriʦ~ʨe βaker, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
